subject: Run full test suite and fix all failures
description:
**Phase 1.3: Test Suite Restoration**

Run complete test suite and fix any failures:
- Run cargo test --all-features --all-targets
- Identify failures from dependency updates
- Fix broken tests
- Verify all 6,097 test lines pass
- Document any test changes in commit messages

- cargo test passes with 0 failures
- All test warnings resolved
- Test coverage maintained
- No ignored/skipped tests added
